description: Prepare the Oracle HR schema for migration to a new instance. Extract the DDL for all objects in the HR schema (tables, views, indexes, sequences, etc.) into /home/ga/Desktop/hr_schema_ddl.sql. Create a migration manifest file at /home/ga/Desktop/migration_manifest.txt listing every object Name, Type, Status, and Row Count (for tables). Create backup copies of the EMPLOYEES, DEPARTMENTS, and JOBS tables named BKP_EMPLOYEES, BKP_DEPARTMENTS, and BKP_JOBS respectively. Generate a dependency report documenting foreign key relationships and object dependencies at /home/ga/Desktop/dependency_report.txt. Connection: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Database=XEPDB1, User=hr, Password=hr123.
